title: True Minecraft
description: What Minecraft could be. a true vanilla plus mod pack with an emphasis on nature!
body:
A true Minecraft plus modpack True Minecraft imagines what minecraft could be, True Minecraft brings detailed new environments while not flooding your inventory, brings new and unique uses to old and unchanged mecanics, and brings new life to your world. turning minecraft into what it was ment to be.

# Key fetures:
- New biomes: plenty of new biomes to explore
- Revamped enchanting to make the game less grindy
- More forgiving: pets are harder to kill and deaths are more forgiving
- Revisit old systems: improved spyglasses, horses, ender dragon, and more!
- Better preformance
- Better graphics
- Lightweight and easy

(Spyglass: to enter constallation mode use middle click)
